refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns a "simplified" geometry version of the given TopoGeometry using the Douglas-Peucker algorithm.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns a "simplified" geometry version of the given TopoGeometry using the Douglas-Peucker algorithm on each component edge.

note.para: The returned geometry may be non-simple or non-valid.
Splitting component edges may help retaining simplicity/validity.
